520 P4C P4C_TRUNK_REST (P4C) Trunk Restraint CHAR 1 Special treatments and procedures: devices and restraints - trunk restraint. 0 = Not Used, 1 = Used less than daily, 2 = Used daily, "-" = Unknown.
